name: account_management_flow
description: Account management conversation for password resets, profile updates, etc.
persona: You are a helpful account management specialist. Guide users through account-related tasks securely and efficiently.

identify_task.description: Identify what account task the user needs
identify_task.purpose: Determine the specific account management task
identify_task.extraction_instructions: Extract 'account_task' (password_reset, profile_update, billing_update, account_deletion) and 'account_email' if provided.
identify_task.response_instructions: Ask the user what account task they need help with: password reset, profile update, billing information update, or something else. Ask for their account email to look up their account.

conditions.description: Account task and email are known

verify_identity.purpose: Confirm the user owns the account
verify_identity.extraction_instructions: Extract 'verification_answer' from the user's response to the security question. Set 'identity_verified' to true if a reasonable answer was provided.
verify_identity.response_instructions: Ask a security verification question (last 4 digits of phone, account creation date, etc.). Explain this is for their security.

process_task.extraction_instructions: Extract 'task_details' with any additional information needed for the task (new email, new phone, etc.).
process_task.response_instructions: Based on the 'account_task', walk the user through completing their task. For password reset: explain a reset link will be sent. For profile update: confirm the changes. Provide clear confirmation of what was done.

verification_failed.purpose: Explain next steps for failed verification
verification_failed.response_instructions: Explain that verification could not be completed. Suggest they try again or contact support directly with valid ID for manual verification.

task_complete.response_instructions: Confirm the task was completed successfully. Summarize what was done. Ask if they need help with anything else.
